Class DatabaseModule

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.database.DatabaseModule
@Module public class DatabaseModule extends Object
Hilt module that provides the Room database and DAO dependencies.

  • Method Details

    • provideDatabase

      @Provides @Singleton public PipPipDatabase provideDatabase(Context context)
      Provides the application's Room database instance.
      Parameters:
      context - application context.
      Returns:
      singleton database instance.

      Returns:
      batch DAO.
